\tzpentry{ID5644}{Wavefunction Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5644 introduces Wavefunction Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \psi_{ij}^{(p:q)} \equiv p\,\phi_j - q\,\phi_i, \label{eq:resonant_angle} \end{equation}
